positive: A detailed, highly stylized illustration of celestial bioluminescent flora—giant, intricate ferns and blooming, nebula-hued orchids that intertwine around a stylized crescent moon. The composition must feature strong, clean silhouettes and symmetrical balance, designed to fit perfectly on an apparel chest print. Use a deep indigo and cosmic violet palette, accented by glowing cyan and soft gold light sources. The style should be a modern blend of Art Nouveau and scientific etching, emphasizing high contrast, sharp linework, and a dreamlike, ethereal glow. Minimal background texture to ensure print crispness, with the flora acting as the primary, centralized focal point. Clean vector aesthetic, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blurry, artifacts, watermark, logo, text, cropped, signature, low detail, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, noise, clutter, dirty, messy, realistic photography
